es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas por inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esta decisión ha generado un gran debate en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: Amper Music, una empresa que utiliza la inteligencia artificial para crear música, ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias que permite a los usuarios obtener permisos para utilizar obras de AI en sus proyectos. Esta plataforma busca resolver los problemas de derechos de autor que surgen al utilizar música creada por IA.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Para proteger tus obras de AI, es importante registrarlas en la Oficina de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos. Asegúrate de proporcionar toda la información necesaria, incluyendo el título de la obra, el nombre del autor y la fecha de creación. También es recomendable mantener registros de la creación de la obra, como notas y borradores, para demostrar la autoría.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created by artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This decision has sparked a heated debate in the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun using AI to create music. Companies like Google and Amazon have also been affected, as they have been investing heavily in AI-generated content.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Amper Music, a company that uses artificial intelligence to create music, has launched a licensing platform that allows users to obtain permissions to use AI-generated works in their projects. This platform aims to resolve the copyright issues that arise when using AI-created music. The platform will provide users with access to a vast library of AI-generated tracks, and will also allow them to customize the music to fit their specific needs.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI-Generated Works
sections.content: To protect your AI-generated works, it's essential to register them with the US Copyright Office. Make sure to provide all the necessary information, including the title of the work, the author's name, and the date of creation. It's also recommended to keep records of the work's creation, such as notes and drafts, to demonstrate authorship. Additionally, consider using a service like the Copyright Alliance to help guide you through the registration process.
